children.text: I'm Yangyang. This is my little brother Chenchen.
children.cn: 我是阳阳。这是我的小弟弟晨晨。
children.explanation: 文中说阳阳是 'I'，晨晨是 'my little brother'。

children.text: I was four and Chenchen was ten months old.
children.cn: 我四岁的时候，晨晨十个月大。
children.explanation: 十个月大小于一岁（12个月）。

children.text: He cried a lot and I was not happy. But I still loved him.
children.cn: 他经常哭，我不开心。但我依然爱他。
children.statement: 阳阳因为弟弟哭而不爱他了。
children.explanation: 文中说 'But I still loved him'（但我依然爱他）。

children.text: I was six and Chenchen was three.
children.cn: 我六岁的时候，晨晨三岁。
children.explanation: 文中明确提到 'Chenchen was three'。

children.text: He didn't listen to me and I was angry. But I still loved him.
children.cn: 他不听我的话，我很生气。但我依然爱他。
children.statement: 弟弟不听话时，阳阳很生气。
children.explanation: 文中说 'I was angry'（我很生气）。

children.text: I was eight and Chenchen was five.
children.cn: 我八岁的时候，晨晨五岁。
children.explanation: 8 - 5 = 3，或者从之前的数据（6-3, 4-10m）可以推断。

children.cn: 我们可以一起踢足球了。
children.statement: 他们在这个阶段可以一起运动了。
children.explanation: 文中提到 'We could play football together'。

children.text: He was not a good player, but we were happy.
children.cn: 他踢得不是很好，但我们很开心。
children.statement: 晨晨是一个非常厉害的足球运动员。
children.explanation: 文中说 'He was not a good player'。

children.text: I'm ten now and Chenchen is seven.
children.cn: 我现在十岁了，晨晨七岁。

children.text: We go to the same school and we help each other.
children.cn: 我们在同一所学校上学，我们互相帮助。
children.statement: 他们在不同的学校上学。
children.explanation: 文中说 'We go to the same school'（我们在同一所学校上学）。

children.text: It's great to grow up together!
children.statement: 阳阳觉得和弟弟一起长大很糟糕。
